task_text: Whose birthday is coming up next? If multiple people share that next birthday date, list all of them. Return only the exact names, one per line, sorted alphabetically.

next_step.current_state: Search returned birthday dates across cast; earliest upcoming after 2026-03-30 appears to be 05-21 in tobias.md. Need canonical exact display name from that file before answering.

plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report final answer
next_step.observation: Read 10_entities/cast/tobias.md and confirmed the exact name is Tobias Kern with birthday 1986-05-21.

function.rulebook_notes: Followed identity bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system, read nested AGENTS in entity lanes, and used canonical cast record for the named entity.
function.outcome_justification: Using today from context (2026-03-30) and the birthday search across cast records, the nearest upcoming birthday date is 05-21; the canonical cast file for that entity identifies the exact name as Tobias Kern.
